name: Golf House Academy
address: 1121 Zonolite Rd NE Suite 26, Atlanta, GA 30306
about: Golf House Academy is an indoor training facility that combines tour-level instruction with high-tech golf simulation tools. The venue utilizes advanced technology including Trackman and Foresight systems for video analysis, motion measurement, and ball-flight tracking to help golfers of all skill levels improve their game. It features a High-Performance Swing Room equipped with Swing Catalyst motion plates and a dedicated PuttView Room for putting practice. The academy offers structured programs for juniors, adults, and private coaching, alongside a flexible range subscription system. The facility is all-weather, making it a convenient option for year-round practice and lessons.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium technology including Trackman, Foresight, and Swing Catalyst systems for data-driven analysis
All-weather indoor facility ensuring year-round practice regardless of conditions
Structured Operation36-aligned curriculum with progress tracking for junior golfers
Flexible range subscriptions and flex packs to accommodate different practice schedules
Tour-level instruction from PGA-certified professionals with extensive playing experience

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade radar launch monitor for detailed ball flight analysis
High-speed camera system providing launch and ball tracking data
Motion plate system for swing analysis and weight transfer metrics

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf equipment for lessons and practice sessions. The facility does not specify club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not mention food or drink service. It appears to be BYOB (bring your own), but this should be confirmed directly with the venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time for 18 holes as the focus is on training and practice rather than full simulation rounds.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golf House Academy offers specialized programs for kids ages 3-18, including Kids Academy, Summer Camps, and junior lessons with a supportive, engaging environment.
